home.heroText: قوِّ إيمانك من خلال التذكيرات والمحاضرات والمعرفة الإسلامية النافعة.

remember.title: Remember Allah
remember.text: Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.
remember.reason: Regular remembrance keeps the heart calm, strengthens trust in Allah, and helps you respond with wisdom during stress.

salah.title: Protect Your Salah
salah.text: Prayer is your daily connection with Allah.
salah.reason: Salah builds discipline, keeps your day anchored around worship, and protects you from drifting into harmful habits.

gratitude.title: Practice Gratitude
gratitude.text: Thank Allah for every blessing, big or small.
gratitude.reason: Gratitude shifts focus from what is missing to what Allah has provided, which increases contentment and spiritual strength.

charity.title: Give Charity
charity.text: Every act of kindness is rewarded.
charity.reason: Charity purifies wealth, supports people in need, and grows mercy in your heart while earning reward from Allah.

patience.title: Have Patience
patience.text: Allah is with those who are patient.
patience.reason: Patience helps you stay principled through tests, avoid regretful reactions, and remain hopeful in Allah's plan.

quran.title: Read the Qur'an
quran.text: Spend a few minutes reading and reflecting today.
quran.reason: Reading Qur'an gives guidance, heals spiritual emptiness, and keeps your decisions aligned with truth and purpose.

auth.joinCommunity: انضم إلى مجتمع مركة خلال دقائق.
auth.mobileFlow: Phone sign-in uses a ping approval and Face ID/Fingerprint.
auth.desktopFlow: Sign in to continue your learning journey.
auth.secureMobileOnly: Secure mobile ping is only required on phone/tablet.
auth.pingSent: Login ping sent ({{code}}). Tap Approve Ping, then use biometrics.
auth.pingApproved: Ping approved. Continue with Face ID/Fingerprint.
auth.approveFirst: Approve the mobile ping before biometric sign-in.
auth.biometricUnsupported: Biometric sign-in is not supported on this device/browser.
auth.noAuthenticator: No Face ID/Fingerprint authenticator is available.
auth.biometricFailed: Biometric sign-in was cancelled or failed. Please try again.
auth.mobileInstruction: On phone, use Secure Mobile Sign-In (ping approval + Face ID/Fingerprint).
auth.pingFailed: Could not send mobile ping. Please try again.

masjids.title: ابحث عن المساجد القريبة
masjids.cityPlaceholder: City, state, or ZIP (optional with location)

status.allowLocation: Allow location access to find nearest masjids nationwide.
status.searchHint: Use current location for nearest masjids nationwide, or enter a city manually.
status.enterCity: Enter a city or enable current location first.
status.noResults: No masjids found for that search.
status.locationUnavailable: Location is unavailable: your browser does not support geolocation.
status.locationDenied: Location permission denied. Allow location access in browser settings or search by city, state, or ZIP.
status.locationUnknown: Location unavailable right now. Check your device location services and try again.
status.locationTimeout: Location request timed out. Please try again or search by city, state, or ZIP.
status.locationFailed: Could not determine your location. Search by city, state, or ZIP instead.

locationMode.nationwideWithLocation: nationwide, prioritized by your current location
locationMode.withinMiles: within {{miles}} miles of your current location

masjids.distanceUnknown: Use my location + 25 mi to show distance
masjids.distanceCalcHint: Use my location + 25 mi to calculate distance

profile.title: ملفي الشخصي
profile.subtitle: تابع تقدمك وحافظ على الاستمرارية واحتفظ بكل ما يهمك في مكان واحد.

empty.activities: No lectures or events saved yet. Add one to begin building your journey.
empty.photos: No photos saved yet. Add a photo, screenshot, or memory from your device.
empty.reminders: No favorite reminders saved yet. Save a reminder that you would like to revisit.
empty.lectures: No lectures or events saved yet. Add one to begin building your journey.
empty.events: No saved events yet. Save events from the Events page to see them here.

validation.unsupportedImageType: This image type is not supported. Use JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF, or HEIC.
validation.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum allowed size is 5 MB.
validation.chooseImage: Please choose an image before saving.

identity.title: العرق أو التراث أو الدعم
identity.description: يمكنك اختيار علم الملف الشخصي اختياريًا بناءً على التراث أو الدعم. مَرَكَة يطبق فقط ما تختاره يدويًا.
identity.supportOnlyDescription: دعم فلسطين يعرض علم فلسطين كخلفية دعم اختيارية.
identity.previewEmpty: لم يتم اختيار علم للملف الشخصي.

messages.saved: تم حفظ اختيار علم الملف الشخصي.
messages.removed: تمت إزالة اختيار علم الملف الشخصي.

details.bioPlaceholder: Add a short bio to introduce your learning journey.

admin.masjidTitle: نظرة عامة على لوحة مسجدك المحلي

seo.homeDescription: اكتشف التذكيرات الإسلامية والجلسات المباشرة والمساجد القريبة والعلماء والفعاليات عبر مركة.
seo.liveDescription: انضم إلى الجلسات الإسلامية المباشرة وحلقات القرآن عبر مركة.
seo.recordingsDescription: تصفح تسجيلات الخطب والمحاضرات الإسلامية في أي وقت.
seo.masjidsDescription: ابحث عن المساجد القريبة واعرض مواقيت الصلاة والفعاليات.
seo.eventsDescription: استكشف الفعاليات القادمة من المساجد المحلية.
seo.feedDescription: ابق على اتصال بالتحديثات النافعة من مجتمع مركة.
seo.profileDescription: تابع تقدمك الإسلامي وتذكيراتك ونشاطك الشخصي.
seo.loginDescription: سجّل الدخول بأمان لمواصلة رحلتك التعليمية.
seo.signupDescription: أنشئ حسابك في مركة وانضم إلى مجتمع النمو الإسلامي.
seo.masjidDashboardDescription: لوحة إدارة المسجد للحضور والدروس والمتطوعين.
